description_long: This bungalow features a low, rectangular profile with a flat, dark gray roof over the central section and lighter, white exterior walls. The front facade is symmetrical, with a central entrance flanked by two sets of windows and a long, straight walkway leading up to the door. The side views reveal a series of large, square windows and some colorful interior elements visible through the glass, suggesting open-plan living spaces. The rear of the bungalow mirrors the front in its symmetry, with three prominent window sections. The structure sits on a broad, flat base, and the overall design is modern and minimalistic, with clean lines and a focus on horizontal elements. The materials appear to be primarily concrete or stucco for the walls, glass for the windows, and possibly metal or composite for the roof.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, white walls, large windows, and a long front walkway. The design is symmetrical and minimalistic, emphasizing clean lines and open spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central entrance, symmetrical window arrangement, and a long walkway leading to the door.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting large windows and glimpses of colorful interior spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying three prominent window sections and a broad, flat base.
description_view_3: Right side view with additional large windows and visible interior details.
